title: SACRAMENTO – Today, Assembly Republicans released a video highlighting President Biden’s comments slamming government-run health care schemes like the one being advanced by Assembl
prompt_preview:

raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Government-run health care schemes like single-payer health care may lead to high costs.",
    "Implementing single-payer health care could result in middle-class tax increases.",
    "Single-payer health care could eliminate current health care plans for individuals.",
